name: Off The Tee
about: Off The Tee is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Garden City, Michigan. The facility offers a space for golfers to play, dine, and train, with a focus on providing entertainment for various occasions such as birthday celebrations, date nights, and family gatherings. The venue is accessible year-round, operating with extended hours on weekends. Golfers can enjoy the convenience of tee times booked through an online system and the option to purchase memberships for access to all simulators. The atmosphere combines a casual, welcoming environment with modern technology, suitable for both casual play and more serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-building private rentals available for events and celebrations
Convenient online tee time booking system
Indoor facility allows for play year-round regardless of weather
Combines golf entertainment with food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food options available, though specific menu details not provided
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though specific rental policies are not detailed on the website.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site food and drink options, but there is no mention of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, though memberships include a maximum of 1 hour of simulator time per day.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Off The Tee is promoted as a family-friendly venue suitable for birthday celebrations and family get-togethers.
